## Checklist

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary (only in hard-to-understand areas)
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works (if applicable)
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` and the build succeeds
- [ ] I have run `cargo check` in `src-tauri/` and it passes without errors
